text:
Once upon a time, in a lush, verdant forest, there was a small, delicate butterfly named Lilac. Lilac had wings that shimmered like the morning dew on the leaves of the trees. She fluttered from flower to flower, sipping nectar and spreading joy wherever she went.

One sunny afternoon, as Lilac was flying near the edge of the forest, she saw a young rabbit who was lost and crying. The poor rabbit had wandered away from her family and was scared and alone. Lilac knew she had to help.

Gently, Lilac landed beside the rabbit and said, "Don't be afraid, little one. I will help you find your way back home." With her gentle touch and soothing words, Lilac reassured the rabbit and began leading her through the forest, pointing out landmarks and safe paths.
